The '''Hunter V''' was a sporting [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] manufactured by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]. The weapon was a civilian version of the [[Sharpshooter V]]. Marketed as a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]], it was widely used by security forces in urban environments for use during inner-city combat.
